sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Olympique Lyonnais have had mixed results in their last 5 matches, with 1 win, 1 draw, and 3 losses, but they showed attacking prowess with a 4-1 win over Stade Rennais. Angers, on the other hand, have shown resilience with 3 wins in their last 5 matches, including a recent 2-1 victory against RC Strasbourg, indicating improved form.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters between these teams, Olympique Lyonnais dominated with a 3-0 and a 3-1 victory over Angers. Historically, Lyon have won 4 of the last 5 head-to-head matches, often scoring early and maintaining control.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Lyon rank 3rd in Ligue 1 for goals scored (63), with strong ball possession (56.6%) and big chances created (104). Angers, positioned 13th, have struggled offensively (32 goals) and defensively (51 conceded), which could be a decisive factor.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: Alexandre Lacazette (Lyon) is in form with 3 goals in the last 5 matches, while Rayan Cherki’s creativity (10 assists) is vital. For Angers, Esteban Lepaul has been a threat with 4 goals recently, but their missing players could impact performance.
